payload.answer: Duplicate Slack delivery detected for the same event. No new memory committed on this retry.

entity_resolution.reason: Same Slack event ID was delivered twice; this retry should not create additional durable memory or repeat entity resolution.

details: Recognized duplicate delivery of the same Slack event ID.
Performed no-op on retry to avoid duplicate memory creation.
Did not re-store 'Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans' from the duplicate delivery.

repair_options: Use Slack event ID as an idempotency key and suppress retried deliveries after the first successful processing.
If the first delivery was not actually persisted, replay exactly once from the original event record rather than ingesting both deliveries.
